# NEXO

> NEXO is NFC + QR digital menu software for restaurants. The menu opens in the browser without an app, helping restaurants increase average order value, reduce ordering mistakes, speed up service, and collect more reviews. Based in Lisbon, Portugal.

NEXO provides a frictionless digital menu: a customer taps an NFC display (or scans a QR code) and the menu opens instantly in any smartphone browser — no app, no install, no login. It adds automatic upsell, real-time orders and waiter-call, automatic Google reviews, four languages, and real-time analytics via Google Analytics 4.

## Main pages

- [Homepage](https://nexosolutions.pt/): Product positioning, features, pricing, and contact form (canonical source).
- [Live demo menu](https://nexosolutions.pt/menu/marisca-petisca/index.html): A real NEXO digital menu in production.
- [Client area / portal](https://nexosolutions.pt/portal/): Login for restaurant operators.

## Pricing

- Eventos: €149 one-time (small events from €99) — digital menu for events, QR included.
- Growth: €89/month — full plan, all features included (NFC + QR multilingual menu, real-time orders & waiter-call, automatic reviews, upsell, analytics, unlimited updates).
- Enterprise: custom pricing — multi-venue / franchising, SLA, institutional website, custom integrations.
- Hardware: NFC display stand €5/unit, one-time.
